title: CRM-to-Email Sync
description: Build a data sync pipeline. Every 1 hour, fetch new Contacts from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users (source system A), transform each to { name, email, tag: 'imported' }, save to a MailingList table (destination system B). Expose GET /api/mailing-list so humans can verify what synced.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a MailingList table:
  name, required
  email, required
  tag, default 'imported'
  synced_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled sync job + /api/mailing-list endpoint here
# Use: every 1 hour: ... get users from 'https://...' ... save ...
